mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(id) from base_organization where cust_id = #{custId} and deleted_flag = 0
mapper.update: update base_organization set state = 1, init_flag = 1, start_time = #{modifiedDate}, modified_by = #{userId}, modified_date = #{modifiedDate} where id = #{orgId}
update base_organization set state = 2, stop_time =#{bean.enableTime}, modified_by = #{bean.userId}, modified_date =#{bean.enableTime} where group_id = #{bean.id} and deleted_flag=0
update base_organization set deleted_flag= 1 ,modified_by=#{userId} ,modified_date=now() where id=#{orgId}
mapper.select: select id as orgId, org_type as orgType, group_id as groupId, cust_id as custId, business_type as businessType, state as state, init_flag as initFlag from base_organization where id=#{queryParam.groupId}
mapper.update: update base_organization set business_type = #{newBizType}, modified_by = #{operatorId}, modified_date = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, org_type AS orgType, state AS state FROM base_organization WHERE id = #{orgId} and state = 1

SELECT id as id, org_code as orgCode, group_id as groupId, org_type as orgType, org_name as orgName, state as state, main_org_flag as rootOrg FROM base_organization WHERE cust_id = #{custId} and org_type = 3 and state = 1

SELECT id, group_id AS groupId, org_type AS orgType, parent_id AS parentId, org_code AS orgCode, parent_bu_id AS parentBUId, org_name AS orgName, state AS state, main_org_flag AS mainOrgFlag FROM base_organization WHERE group_id = (SELECT group_id FROM base_organization WHERE id = #{orgId}) AND state = 1

select id, group_id AS groupId, org_type AS orgType, parent_id AS parentId, org_code AS orgCode, parent_bu_id AS parentBUId, org_name AS orgName, state AS state, main_org_flag AS mainOrgFlag FROM base_organization WHERE group_id = (SELECT group_id FROM base_organization WHERE id = #{orgId}) AND deleted_flag=0

SELECT id, group_id AS groupId, org_type AS orgType, parent_id AS parentId, org_code AS orgCode, parent_bu_id AS parentBUId, org_name AS orgName, state AS state, main_org_flag AS mainOrgFlag, cust_id as custId, business_type as bizType FROM base_organization WHERE group_id = (SELECT group_id FROM base_organization WHERE id = #{orgId}) AND state = 1 and org_type in (2, 3)

SELECT id, group_id AS groupId, org_type AS orgType, parent_id AS parentId, org_code AS orgCode, parent_bu_id AS parentBUId, org_name AS orgName, state AS state, main_org_flag AS mainOrgFlag FROM base_organization WHERE id = #{orgId} AND deleted_flag=0

select org.id, org.main_org_flag, org.state, org.org_name, org.group_id, org.parent_id, org.cust_id, org.org_type, org.org_code, org.parent_bu_id, org.org_short_name, org.industry_code, org.industry_name, org.business_type, org.company_id, org.region_code, org.region_name, org.province_code, org.province_name, org.city_code, org.city_name, org.district_code, org.district_name, org.street_code, org.street_name, org.address, org.phone, org.email, org.dep_duty_staff, func.function_type, func.state from base_organization org LEFT JOIN base_organization_function func on org.id = func.org_id where org.id = #{orgId}

SELECT id, group_id AS groupId, org_type AS orgType, parent_id AS parentId, org_code AS orgCode, parent_bu_id AS parentBUId, org_name AS orgName, state AS state, main_org_flag AS mainOrgFlag FROM base_organization WHERE state = 1 and org_type in (2, 3) and org_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{orgName},'%')

SELECT id , group_id AS groupId , org_type AS orgType, parent_id AS parentId , org_code AS orgCode, parent_bu_id AS parentBUId , org_name AS orgName , state AS state, main_org_flag AS mainOrgFlag FROM base_organization WHERE state = 1 and group_id in
#{groupId}

SELECT id as id, org_type AS orgType, org_code AS orgCode, org_name AS orgName , main_org_flag AS mainOrgFlag FROM base_organization WHERE state = 1
and org_name like CONCAT('%',#{queryParam.orgName},'%')
and org_code like CONCAT('%',#{queryParam.orgCode},'%')
and (org_name like CONCAT('%',#{queryParam.keyWord},'%') or org_code like CONCAT('%',#{queryParam.keyWord},'%'))
and parent_bu_id = #{queryParam.orgId}

select id, group_id, parent_id, org_type, org_code, org_name, cust_id, state, parent_bu_id, business_type, created_date FROM base_organization where state =1
and id =#{id}

select id, org_name, cust_id, group_id, province_name, province_code, city_code, city_name, district_code, district_name, street_code, address, street_name from base_organization where id = #{reqParam.orgId}
